login.title: Resume a secure session.
login.subtitle: Sign in
login.description: The backend keeps tokens in signed httpOnly cookies. This client only consumes authenticated user state.

register.title: Start with a clean auth flow.
register.subtitle: Register
register.description: Registration creates the account and keeps the first login explicit, aligned with backend contracts.
register.alert: After creating your account, the app redirects you to sign in.

forgotPassword.title: Recover access securely.
forgotPassword.subtitle: Password recovery
forgotPassword.description: Request reset instructions. The response is always safe and idempotent.
forgotPassword.success: Recovery instructions were generated when the account exists.
forgotPassword.error: Unable to process the recovery request

resetPassword.title: Set a new password.
resetPassword.subtitle: Reset password
resetPassword.description: Use the one-time token delivered by the backend and choose a new password.

verifyEmail.title: Verify your email.
verifyEmail.subtitle: Email verification
verifyEmail.description: Use your one-time verification token to activate your email.

changePassword.title: Rotate password
changePassword.description: Changing your password revokes active sessions and forces new authentication.
changePassword.hint: Changing your password revokes all active sessions.

changeEmail.title: Change email
changeEmail.description: Updating email requires a new verification cycle and may invalidate active sessions.
changeEmail.label: New email

sessions.title: Danger zone: Sessions
sessions.description: Immediately revoke access for all active devices, including this one.

sessionsList.title: Active sessions
sessionsList.description: Inspect active sessions and revoke suspicious devices.

fields.passwordHint: The system requires a minimum of 8 characters.

validation.password: Password must contain at least 8 characters
validation.passwordDifferent: New password must be different from the current one

security.subtitle: Security center
security.title: Account security controls
security.description: Manage credentials, verification and sessions from one secure surface.

home.title: Authentication that feels fast, calm, and under control.
home.subtitle: Precision auth workspace
home.description: JetAuth brings sign-in, recovery, verification, and session security into one refined flow built for product-grade access.
home.consoleDescription: Secure entry, recovery, and session control in one refined surface.

cookies.title: Session integrity
cookies.description: Cookie-backed sessions stay inside the browser while the UI keeps state clear and predictable.

recovery.title: Recovery without friction
recovery.description: Reset and verification flows stay fluid, guided, and safe from first step to completion.

ux.title: Operational security
ux.description: Credentials, device access, and sensitive actions remain readable when precision matters.

dashboard.emptyDescription: This route expects a backend-authenticated session. Sign in again to continue.

refresh.title: Refresh-aware
refresh.description: Protected fetches retry once after the backend refresh endpoint rotates the session.

sessions.title: Session-backed access
sessions.description: The backend validates active sessions and revocation state before serving protected routes.

password.title: Password invalidation
password.description: Changing the password clears all active sessions and sends the user back through login.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: This route does not exist in the current authentication frontend flow.

unauthorized.title: Session required
unauthorized.description: Protected area. Sign in with a valid session to continue.
